TaskDescription: focus on the marker and to listen to the music that was diffused during the experiment (Bach Invention from one to ten on harpsichord). Trial duration: 60.0s.
Instructions: Subjects were asked to focus on the marker and to listen to the music that was diffused during the experiment
InstitutionName: GIPSA-lab, CNRS, University Grenoble-Alpes, Grenoble INP
InstitutionAddress: GIPSA-lab, 11 rue des Mathématiques, Grenoble Campus BP46, F-38402, France
Description: This dataset contains electroencephalographic recordings of 12 subjects listening to music with and without a passive head-mounted display
